channel.title: Awesome Prompting Hacks
channel.description: Free production-grade AI prompt templates for ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, and Midjourney.

item.title: ChatGPT Prompt Optimizer & Engineering Console
item.description: Copy and run the calibrated AI prompt template for: "ChatGPT Prompt Optimizer & Engineering Console". Tags: chatgpt, prompt-engineering, chat-gpt, openai, seo.
